ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Atal Realtech Limited announced the immediate resignation of Mr. Akshay Vinod Dhongade, an Independent Director, effective July 15, 2026, citing "pre-occupancy." While he confirmed no other material reasons, this creates a vacancy on the board, potentially impacting its independent oversight and requiring a timely replacement to maintain governance standards. The vague reason for departure is a minor point to note, though mitigated by the explicit confirmation of no other material issues.
